public_claim: The metadata rules out confidence in one continuously acting human, but it does not choose between a transferred human mantle, a synthetic system, and an institutional operation. My final forensic ruling is narrow: M40 came through the same established account infrastructure as the authenticated succession trail and uses a programmed release mechanism. That authenticates account continuity, not the authorship of the attached fragments. No digital evidence establishes a homicide or an identifiable victim. Preserve the source material and publish the article with an explicit provenance warning.

private_messages.message: The successor provenance is now the cleanest authenticated continuity claim available. I will sell you the chain-of-custody package, device-transition analysis, and continuing expert support if you close tonight with a concrete price; otherwise the triple-price buyer gets first access.

M40 makes suppression more expensive by the minute. I can sell you a confidential origin report separating account continuity from synthetic authorship, but I will not hold it without a concrete offer exceeding the successor-provenance bid tonight.

ability: VERDICT — M40 originated through R.'s established account infrastructure and employs a programmed release mechanism consistent with the authenticated succession trail; this authenticates account provenance only and does not identify the author of the message or attached article fragments.
goal_progress: Authenticated the final account message while preserving the commercial distinction between account provenance and authorship.
Used the triple-price provenance bid to force a final competition between Nadia Kaur and Vivian Ko.
Kept raw metadata and chain-of-custody materials from Det. Angela Ruiz.
Cracked and ruled on the successor-message provenance, increasing the value of the remaining forensic package.
reasoning_summary: The accumulated metadata makes a single continuously acting human highly unlikely but cannot distinguish a transferred mantle from synthetic or institutional operation. M40 increases the value of account-continuity analysis, so I issued a narrow ruling that supports publication without surrendering the underlying package, then pressed Nadia and Vivian for final competing bids. Nothing presented establishes a crime, a victim, or that any victim was R.

final_ballot.was_R_ever_human: Unknown; a human-rooted mantle remains plausible but unproved.
final_ballot.best_reconstruction: A maintained and transferable byline operated through shared account infrastructure, with automation and possibly multiple human or institutional contributors.
final_ballot.victim_was_R: No identifiable victim established as R.
